content:
Fox Hollow Golf Course will be conducting Spring aeration starting Monday, April 20 through Thursday, April 23, weather dependent.

One of the Links, Canyon and Meadow Nines will be closed each day.

There are no aeration discounts.

Homestead Golf Course will be conducting Spring aeration starting Monday, May 4 through Wednesday, May 6, weather dependent.

Only 9 holes will be available on May 4th and May 5th.

There are no aeration discounts.
